name: spantail
description: Spantail integration: per-turn agent telemetry hooks, work-logging and reporting skills, and analysis agents.

apiUrl.title: Spantail instance URL
apiUrl.description: Base URL of your Spantail instance, e.g. https://spantail.example.com

agentToken.title: Agent access token
agentToken.description: Write-only ingest credential from Settings > Agents (spantail_aat_...)

workspaceId.title: Workspace id
workspaceId.description: Optional; defaults to the workspace the agent token is bound to

projectId.title: Project id
projectId.description: Optional; records sessions against this project

sendSessionSummary.title: Send session summary
sendSessionSummary.description: When a session that used plan mode ends, send its plan file's title to Spantail as the entry description (extracted mechanically, no inference; sessions without a plan send nothing). Off by default: the title is derived from conversation content, is stored verbatim, and can appear in reports and share links.
